questions.text: Choose the correct sentence:

options.text: The manager have approved the budget.
The manager has approved the budget.
The manager has approve the budget.
The manager have approve the budget.

questions.text: Select the sentence with correct subject-verb agreement:

options.text: Each of the employees are responsible for their own tasks.
Each of the employees is responsible for his or her own tasks.
Each of the employees are responsible for his or her own tasks.
Each of the employees is responsible for their own task.

questions.text: Identify the error: "The company's annual report, along with the financial statements, were submitted to the board yesterday."
Complete the sentence: "If the shipment _____ on time, we would not have lost the client."
Which sentence uses the correct tense?

options.text: By the time we reach Hawassa, the conference will have already started.
By the time we reach Hawassa, the conference will already start.
By the time we reach Hawassa, the conference already started.
By the time we reach Hawassa, the conference has already started.

questions.text: Choose the correct word: "The CEO spoke _____ about the company's growth in the Ethiopian market."
Identify the sentence with correct punctuation:

options.text: The meeting which was scheduled for Monday has been postponed.
The meeting, which was scheduled for Monday, has been postponed.
The meeting which was scheduled for Monday, has been postponed.
The meeting, which was scheduled for Monday has been postponed.

questions.text: Choose the correct form: "Neither the director nor the managers _____ available for the press conference."
Select the correct relative pronoun: "The investor _____ proposal was accepted will arrive in Addis Ababa next week."
Identify the error: "The data shows that exports has increased by 15% compared to last fiscal year."
What does the word "remuneration" mean in a business context?
Choose the word that best completes the sentence: "The bank decided to _____ the loan application due to insufficient collateral."
The word "procurement" most closely means:

options.text: The process of selling goods abroad
The act of obtaining goods or services
The closing of a business deal

questions.text: Which word is the best synonym for "feasible"?
"The company's stakeholders expressed concern about the _____ of the new policy." Choose the best word:
What does "due diligence" refer to in a business context?

options.text: A thorough investigation before signing a deal

questions.text: Choose the correct word: "The audit revealed several _____ in the accounting records."
The phrase "to expedite a process" means to:
Which word means "a formal expression of disapproval"?
"The NGO's mandate is to _____ poverty in rural Ethiopia." Choose the best word:

Read the passage: "Commercial Bank of Ethiopia recently announced a new digital banking platform aimed at expanding financial inclusion across rural areas. The platform allows customers to open accounts, transfer funds, and apply for microloans using basic mobile phones. Bank officials expect the service to reach 5 million new customers within two years."

What is the primary goal of the new platform?

options.text: To replace all physical bank branches
To make banking accessible to more people in rural areas
To offer investment services to wealthy clients

questions.text: Based on the same passage about CBE's digital platform, which of the following can be inferred?

options.text: Smartphones are required to use the service.
The platform is already serving 5 million customers.
Many rural residents currently lack access to banking.
The bank plans to close its urban branches.

questions.text:
Read the memo: "To: All Staff. Subject: Updated Leave Policy. Effective April 1, employees must submit leave requests at least 10 working days in advance. Emergency leave may still be taken with same-day notification to your direct supervisor. Unused annual leave cannot be carried over to the next fiscal year. HR will send individual leave balances by March 15."

According to the memo, what happens to unused annual leave?

options.text: It rolls over to the next year
It is donated to other employees

questions.text: Based on the leave policy memo, which statement is TRUE?

options.text: Employees will receive their leave balance information before the policy starts.
Leave requests must be approved by HR directly.

questions.text:
Read the passage: "Ethiopia's industrial parks have attracted over 80 international manufacturing firms since 2016, primarily in textiles and apparel. While the parks have created approximately 80,000 jobs, critics argue that wages remain below the cost of living in surrounding areas. Proponents counter that the parks provide essential skills training and long-term economic benefits that extend beyond direct employment."

What is the main criticism of industrial parks mentioned in the passage?

options.text: They have not attracted enough companies.
Worker wages are insufficient for basic needs.

questions.text: Based on the industrial parks passage, what argument do supporters make?

options.text: Wages will double within a year.
The parks offer training and broader economic gains.
More parks should be built immediately.

questions.text:
Read the email: "Dear Mr. Tadesse, Thank you for your interest in our consulting services. After reviewing your requirements, we believe our firm can deliver the market analysis report within six weeks. Our fee for this scope of work is USD 12,000, payable in two instalments. Please find the detailed proposal attached. We look forward to your confirmation so we may begin immediately. Best regards, Sarah Chen."

What is the purpose of this email?

options.text: To present a service proposal and seek approval
To complain about a delayed report

questions.text: Based on the email from Sarah Chen, how will the payment be structured?

Read the notice: "The Ethiopian Investment Commission hereby informs all foreign investors that the revised investment proclamation requires re-registration of existing licenses by December 31. Failure to comply will result in suspension of operating permits. Investors may submit documents online through the Commission's portal or in person at regional offices."

What is the consequence of not re-registering by the deadline?
Based on the investment commission notice, how many ways can investors submit their documents?

options.text: Three — online, in person, or by mail

questions.text: Which is the most appropriate opening for a formal business letter to someone you have not met?
Which closing is most appropriate for a professional email to a client?
You need to inform a colleague that a meeting has been rescheduled. Which is the most professional phrasing?

options.text: FYI the meeting got moved. Deal with it.
Please be advised that the project review meeting has been rescheduled to Thursday at 2:00 PM.
The meeting is Thursday now I think maybe 2 PM.

questions.text: What should the subject line of a professional email do?

options.text: Be as long and detailed as possible
Clearly summarize the email's purpose in a few words
Use all capital letters for emphasis

questions.text: Which sentence is most appropriate in a formal report?

options.text: The project totally failed because nobody cared.
The project did not achieve its objectives due to insufficient stakeholder engagement.
The project was a disaster and everyone knows it.
Basically the project flopped big time.

questions.text: When writing a business proposal, which tone is most appropriate?
You are writing a follow-up email after a job interview at an Addis Ababa firm. Which is the best opening line?

options.text: I'm writing to ask why you haven't responded yet.
Thank you for taking the time to meet with me yesterday to discuss the Marketing Manager position.
Just checking in about the job thing.

questions.text: Which of the following is an example of the passive voice used appropriately in business writing?

options.text: We made a mistake in the report.
The report was reviewed and approved by the finance department.
I will finish the presentation tomorrow.

questions.text: Which transition word best shows contrast between two ideas?
A colleague sends you an email with the message: "Pls send me d file ASAP!!!" You need to forward this request to your director. Which is the best way to rephrase it?

options.text: Pls send me d file ASAP!!!
Could you please send the file at your earliest convenience?
I need that file like yesterday.
